name: AWS SAA-C03 Quiz
shortDesc: A focused study tool for the AWS Solutions Architect Associate exam. Drill through 600+ real-style questions with a per-question timer, then get a Claude-powered explanation of every miss — keywords, reasoning, and an exam tip — streamed in line.

hero.title: Drill the exam.
paragraphs: Studying for the AWS Solutions Architect Associate is a slog — hundreds of questions, tricky wording, and answer keys that tell you what's right but never why.

This app pulls from a pool of 600+ real exam-style questions, lets you run a quiz of any size with a per-question timer, and after every miss it streams a Claude-powered explanation that breaks down the correct answer, the keywords you should have caught, and a one-line exam tip you can carry into test day.

points.title: 600+ real-style questions
points.desc: Single and multi-answer questions sampled randomly from the full pool, with a multi-answer badge so you know how many to pick.

points.title: AI explanations that actually teach
points.desc: Every wrong answer streams a Claude explanation: why the right choice is right, the keywords that signaled it, and an exam tip — plus a follow-up box so you can keep asking.

points.title: Track every attempt
points.desc: Quiz history saves your score, percentage, duration, and the questions you saw — so you can spot weak topics over time instead of guessing.

demo.label: Screenshots
demo.title: See it in action
demo.subtitle: Starting a quiz, answering a question, and reading the streamed explanation.

screenshots.alt: AWS SAA-03 Quiz start screen with questions-per-round selector
screenshots.caption: The start screen — pick a question count from the 652-question pool and go.

screenshots.alt: SAA-C03 question with per-question timer — supports single to multi-answer questions
screenshots.caption: Supports single to multi-answer questions, with a per-question timer ring and a badge showing how many to pick.

screenshots.alt: Claude's streamed explanation breaking down the correct answers after a miss
screenshots.caption: Claude's streamed explanation after a miss — correct answers in green, eliminated choice struck through, and a breakdown of why each option is right.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From start screen to streamed explanation
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from picking a question count to a Claude tutor in the panel below your answer.

steps.title: Pick a count and start
steps.desc: Choose how many questions you want, hit start, and the worker samples that many at random from `questions.json`. A progress bar and per-question timer ring track you as you go.

steps.title: Answer — single or multi
steps.desc: Single-answer questions submit instantly; multi-answer questions show a badge with the required count and only enable submit when you've picked that many. You can also right-click any choice to eliminate it visually while you think.

steps.title: Get a streamed explanation
steps.desc: After you submit, the app POSTs to `/api/explain`, which calls Claude with your question, your answer, and the correct answer. The response streams back token-by-token via SSE, with a follow-up input so you can keep the conversation going on anything you don't understand.

tech.label: Under the hood
tech.title: How it was built
tech.subtitle: Started as a Flask app, then collapsed into a single Cloudflare Worker so the whole thing serves from one URL.

items: Single-file vanilla HTML, CSS, and JS — no framework, no build step
Per-question timer ring, progress bar, and start / quiz / result screens
Right-click eliminate, multi-answer badge, and inline streamed explanations
Cloudflare KV stores quiz history — score, duration, percentage, and question list
Anthropic Claude API (`claude-opus-4-6`) called with SSE streaming proxied to the browser
600+ AWS SAA-C03 questions extracted from PDF into CSV, then JSON
Originally a Flask app with pandas + flask-limiter; rewritten as a Worker for single-URL hosting
Static assets and API served from the same Worker — no separate frontend deploy
